languages.text: "Значит, вся станция работала на энергии одной маленькой ксенобатарейки?"
"So the whole station was running on the energy provided by one small xenobattery?"
languages.original_text: "Значит, вся станция работала на энергии одной маленькой ксенобатарейки?"

traits.locale_text: "So the whole station was running on the energy provided by one small xenobattery?"
"So the whole station was running on the energy provided by one small xenobattery?"
"So the whole station was running on the energy provided by one small xenobattery?"

languages.text: 「つまり、この駅全体が、たった1個の異星電池から供給されるエネルギーで動いていたということね？」
languages.original_text: "So the whole station was running on the energy provided by one small xenobattery?"

traits.locale_text: 「つまり、この駅全体が、たった1個の異星電池から供給されるエネルギーで動いていたということですね？」

languages.text: «Entonces, ¿toda la estación funcionaba con la energía de una pequeña xenobatería?».
languages.original_text: "So the whole station was running on the energy provided by one small xenobattery?"

traits.locale_text: «Entonces, ¿toda la estación funcionaba con la energía de una pequeña xenobatería?».

languages.text: “所以，整个星站全靠这块小小的异形电池供能？”
languages.original_text: "So the whole station was running on the energy provided by one small xenobattery?"

traits.locale_text: “所以，整个星站全靠这块小小的异形电池供能？”

languages.text: "Dann wurde die gesamte Station von einer kleinen Xenobatterie mit Energie versorgt?"
languages.original_text: "So the whole station was running on the energy provided by one small xenobattery?"

traits.locale_text: "Dann wurde die gesamte Station von einer kleinen Xenobatterie mit Energie versorgt?"

languages.text: "Yani koca istasyon, tek bir küçük zeno bataryasının sağladığı enerjiyle mi çalışıyordu?"
languages.original_text: "So the whole station was running on the energy provided by one small xenobattery?"

traits.locale_text: "Yani koca istasyon, tek bir küçük zeno bataryasının sağladığı enerjiyle mi çalışıyordu?"

languages.text: « Toute la station fonctionnait donc grâce à l'énergie d'une seule petite xénobatterie ? »
languages.original_text: "So the whole station was running on the energy provided by one small xenobattery?"

traits.locale_text: « Toute la station fonctionnait donc grâce à l'énergie d'une seule petite xénobatterie ? »
